## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] ASCII mockup produced for each screen/state
- [ ] Mermaid workflow diagram produced for each key user action
- [ ] Data flow noted (what is displayed, where it comes from, what mutations occur)
- [ ] Design signed off by developer
